text: The elder<S>4245</S> unto Gaius<S>1050</S> the beloved<S>27</S>, whom<S>3739</S> I<S>1473</S> love<S>25</S> in<S>1722</S> truth<S>225</S>.

Beloved<S>27</S>, I pray<S>2172</S> that<S>2137</S> in<S>4012</S> all things<S>3956</S> thou<S>4571</S> mayest prosper<S>2137</S> and<S>2532</S> be in health<S>5198</S>, even as<S>2531</S> thy<S>4675</S> soul<S>5590</S> prospereth<S>2137</S>.

For<S>1063</S> I rejoiced<S>5463</S> greatly<S>3029</S>, when brethren<S>80</S> came<S>2064</S> and<S>2532</S> bare witness unto<S>3140</S> thy<S>4675</S> truth<S>225</S>, even as<S>2531</S> thou<S>4771</S> walkest<S>4043</S> in<S>1722</S> truth<S>225</S>.
Greater<S>3186</S> joy<S>5479</S> have<S>2192</S> I none<S>3756</S> than<S>2443</S> this<S>191</S>, to hear of my<S>1699</S> children<S>5043</S> walking<S>4043</S> in<S>1722</S> the truth<S>225</S>.

Beloved<S>27</S>, thou doest<S>4160</S> a faithful<S>4103</S> work in whatsoever<S>3739</S> thou doest<S>2038</S> toward<S>1519</S> them that are brethren<S>80</S> and<S>2532</S> strangers<S>3581</S> withal<S>1519</S>;

who<S>3739</S> bare witness<S>3140</S> to thy<S>4675</S> love<S>26</S> before<S>1799</S> the church<S>1577</S>: whom<S>3739</S> thou wilt do<S>4160</S> well<S>2573</S> to set forward on their journey<S>4311</S> worthily<S>516</S> of God<S>2316</S>:
because that<S>1063</S> for<S>5228</S> the sake<S>5228</S> of the<S>846</S> Name<S>3686</S> they went forth<S>1831</S>, taking<S>2983</S> nothing<S>3367</S> of<S>575</S> the Gentiles<S>1484</S>.
We<S>2249</S> therefore<S>3767</S> ought<S>3784</S> to welcome<S>618</S> such<S>5108</S>, that<S>2443</S> we may be<S>1096</S> fellow-workers<S>4904</S> for the truth<S>225</S>.

I wrote somewhat unto<S>1125</S> the church<S>1577</S>: but<S>235</S> Diotrephes<S>1361</S>, who loveth to have the preeminence<S>5383</S> among them<S>846</S>, receiveth<S>1926</S> us<S>2248</S> not<S>3756</S>.

Therefore<S>5124</S>, if<S>1437</S> I come<S>2064</S>, I will bring to remembrance<S>5279</S> his<S>846</S> works<S>2041</S> which<S>3739</S> he doeth<S>4160</S>, prating against<S>5396</S> us<S>2248</S> with<S>3056</S> wicked<S>4190</S> words<S>3056</S>: and<S>2532</S> not<S>3361</S> content<S>714</S> therewith<S>5125</S>, neither<S>3777</S> doth<S>1926</S> he himself<S>846</S> receive<S>1926</S> the brethren<S>80</S>, and<S>2532</S> them that would<S>1014</S> he forbiddeth<S>2967</S> and<S>2532</S> casteth<S>1544</S> them out of<S>1537</S> the church<S>1577</S>.

Beloved<S>27</S>, imitate<S>3401</S> not<S>3361</S> that which is<S>3588</S> evil<S>2556</S>, but<S>235</S> that which is<S>3588</S> good<S>18</S>. He<S>3588</S> that doeth good<S>15</S> is<S>2076</S> of<S>1537</S> God<S>2316</S>: <S>1161</S> he<S>3588</S> that doeth evil<S>2554</S> hath<S>3708</S> not<S>3756</S> seen<S>3708</S> God<S>2316</S>.

Demetrius<S>1216</S> hath the witness<S>3140</S> of<S>5259</S> all<S>3956</S> men<S>2532</S>, and of<S>5259</S> the truth<S>225</S> itself<S>846</S>: yea<S>1161</S>, <S>2532</S> we<S>2249</S> also bear witness<S>3140</S>: and<S>2532</S> thou knowest<S>1492</S> that<S>3754</S> our<S>2257</S> witness<S>3141</S> is<S>2076</S> true<S>227</S>.

I had<S>2192</S> many things<S>4183</S> to write<S>1125</S> unto thee<S>235</S>, but I am<S>2309</S> unwilling<S>3756</S> to write<S>1125</S> them to thee<S>4671</S> with<S>1223</S> ink<S>3188</S> and<S>2532</S> pen<S>2563</S>:

but<S>1161</S> I hope<S>1679</S> shortly<S>2112</S> to see<S>1492</S> thee<S>4571</S>, and<S>2532</S> we shall<S>1492</S> speak<S>2980</S> face<S>4750</S> to<S>4314</S> face<S>4750</S>. Peace<S>1515</S> be unto thee<S>4671</S>. The friends<S>5384</S> salute<S>782</S> thee<S>4571</S>. Salute<S>782</S> the friends<S>5384</S> by<S>2596</S> name<S>3686</S>.
